en: I just, I need to know that it's possible that two people can stay happy together forever.
Well, it's not easy, that's for sure. And I don't have the best track record in the
world, I know, but I've been with your stepmother for ten years now, and I'm proud to say we're
ko: 10년째인데, 우리가 아주 행복하다고 자신 있게 말할 수 있어.

en: very happy. Look, in my opinion, the best thing you can do is find a person who loves
ko: 봐, 내 생각에 네가 할 수 있는 최선은

en: you for exactly what you are. Good mood, bad mood, ugly, pretty, handsome, what have you.
ko: 기분 좋을 때, 나쁠 때, 못생겼을 때, 예쁠 때, 잘생겼을 때, 뭐든.

en: The right person's still going to think the sun shines out your ass. That's the kind of
ko: 맞는 사람은 네 엉덩이에서도 햇살이 나온다고 생각할 거야.
그런 사람이 함께할 가치가 있는 사람이야.
